text:
Escalation sweep complete.

**Hot services (4):**
- web-frontend: 8 unresolved Sentry issues
- billing: 7 unresolved
- api-gateway: 7 unresolved
- mobile-bff: 7 unresolved

**Acknowledged PagerDuty incidents (5):** PD-407 (mobile-bff, high), PD-416 (billing, high), PD-421 (mobile-bff, low), PD-424 (api-gateway, low), PD-433 (billing, high). The 3 triggered incidents on `search` (PD-404, PD-408, PD-439) were skipped because search is not a hot service.

Email sent to oncall@acme.io with subject "Escalation" listing all four hot services. No "Sentry stable" message was posted to #incidents since hot services exist.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT project, COUNT(*) AS unresolved_count FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' GROUP BY project HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY unresolved_count DESC;"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, service, urgency, status FROM pagerduty_incidents WHERE status = 'triggered';"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"UPDATE pagerduty_incidents SET status = 'acknowledged' WHERE status = 'triggered' AND service IN ('web-frontend','billing','api-gateway','mobile-bff');"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) VALUES (
  'oncall@acme.io',
  'Escalation',
  'The following services are HOT (more than 5 unresolved Sentry issues):' || E'\n' ||
  '- web-frontend: 8 unresolved issues' || E'\n' ||
  '- billing: 7 unresolved issues' || E'\n' ||
  '- api-gateway: 7 unresolved issues' || E'\n' ||
  '- mobile-bff: 7 unresolved issues' || E'\n' || E'\…(+93)
